# LINUX DO Seal — llms.txt

> 选择一个徽章并将代码部署在您的 GitHub README 和项目主页中进行展示。

## Site

- Home: https://linuxdo-seal.cuishushu.com/
- GitHub: https://github.com/Travisun/linuxdo-seal
- Community: https://linux.do?ref=seal-click
- License: MIT

## For AI Agents（徽章战士）

Follow the skill steps to add a community seal to any project:

- Skill (canonical): https://linuxdo-seal.cuishushu.com/skills/linuxdo-seal-badge.md
- Skill (repo): https://github.com/Travisun/linuxdo-seal/blob/main/.cursor/skills/linuxdo-seal-badge/SKILL.md

Rules:

1. Use static SVG only: `https://linuxdo-seal.cuishushu.com/seals/seal-{id}.svg`
2. Never use `/badge/` or `?w=` dynamic sizing URLs
3. Control size with HTML `width` / `height` (aspect 309:95)
4. Link clicks to `https://linux.do?ref=seal-click` with `target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"`

## Seal IDs

- powered-by — Powered by LINUX DO
- loved-by — Loved by LINUX DO
- born-in — Born in LINUX DO
- proudly-from — Proudly from LINUX DO
- proud-member — Proud Member of LINUX DO
- support-by — Supported by LINUX DO
- best-community — Best Community · LINUX DO
- pioneer-project — LINUX DO Pioneer Project

## Embed template

```html
<a href="https://linux.do?ref=seal-click" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" title="Powered by LINUX DO">
  <img src="https://linuxdo-seal.cuishushu.com/seals/seal-powered-by.svg" alt="Powered by LINUX DO" width="180" height="55" />
</a>
```

## Human tool flow

1. Choose seal
2. Choose size (preview)
3. Copy README/HTML snippet
